title: Orders Above Customer Average
description: Find orders where the amount is greater than the average order amount of that same customer.
sql_solution: SELECT * FROM orders o WHERE amount > (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM orders WHERE customer_id = o.customer_id);
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

customer_averages = orders.groupBy("customer_id").agg(avg("amount").alias("avg_amount"))

result = (
    orders.alias("o")
    .join(customer_averages.alias("a"), col("o.customer_id") == col("a.customer_id"), "inner")
    .filter(col("o.amount") > col("a.avg_amount"))
    .select(col("o.customer_id").alias("customer_id"), col("o.amount").alias("amount"))
)
